# DESIGN.md lint baseline — RestoreAssist
# Generated 2026-05-11 when DESIGN.md adoption shipped.
# These counts represent pre-existing violations the lint warns about but does
# not block on. New violations above these numbers will fail CI.
#
# To lower a baseline after a migration: rerun the lint locally, copy the new
# count here, and commit.
#
# 2026-05-13: bumped 353 → 355. Setup wizard ships two new cards
# (components/setup/StorageCard.tsx, components/setup/IntegrationsCard.tsx)
# that use 4 lucide icons (Cloud, HardDrive, ChevronRight, KeyRound) consistent
# with the rest of the codebase. Migration to src/components/ui/marks.tsx is a
# separate cleanup tracked outside this PR.
#
# 2026-05-13 (later): bumped 355 → 357. PR #957 added Next.js error.tsx
# boundaries to /login and /signup; each imports { AlertTriangle, RotateCcw }
# from lucide-react. Files: app/login/error.tsx, app/signup/error.tsx.
#
# 2026-05-13 (even later): bumped 357 → 358. PR #938 (RA-2967 floor plan
# opt-in) added app/dashboard/settings/floor-plan/page.tsx which imports
# { Loader2, Map } from lucide-react, consistent with the rest of the
# settings/* surface.
#
# 2026-05-14 (Seam C): bumped 358 → 359. Sub-project #7's
# components/inspection/CapturePhotoFab.tsx imports { Camera } from lucide-react.
#
# 2026-05-15 (Wave 1 release): bumped 359 → 362. Three new lucide imports
# arrive via the sandbox→main release PR #1035:
# 1. components/inspection/ClaimTypePicker.tsx — 4-option claim-type picker
#    (S540 + WATER/MOULD/FIRE/TRAUMA). Landed via #1034 direct to main
#    during swarm; baseline bump missed the merge.
# 2. components/dashboard/InboundJobAlert.tsx — DR/NRPG inbound job
#    alert card (AlertCircle, ArrowRight, Loader2).
# 3. components/inspection/CloseJobPrompt.tsx — SP-A close-job prompt
#    component invoked from the inspection-detail page.
# All three consistent with the rest of components/inspection/* +
# components/dashboard/*. Migration to src/components/ui/marks.tsx is a
# separate cleanup tracked outside this PR.
#
# 2026-06-09 (Simple mode): bumped 362 -> 364. PR #1247 adds
# app/dashboard/nav-config.ts, which imports { Plus, FileText, Users,
# Receipt, CreditCard, HelpCircle } and the LucideIcon type from lucide-react
# for the new Simple-mode sidebar items, consistent with the existing nav in
# app/dashboard/layout.tsx. Migration to src/components/ui/marks.tsx remains
# a separate cleanup tracked outside this PR.
#
# 2026-07-02 (RA-6917): bumped 364 -> 365. PR #1632 added the admin data-asset
# page app/dashboard/admin/restoration-insights/page.tsx, which imports
# { Lock, Download, BarChart3, ShieldCheck } from lucide-react, consistent with
# the rest of the app/dashboard/admin/* surface (usage, users, etc.). The bump
# was missed on that merge and surfaced on the follow-up PR #1633; recorded
# here. Migration to src/components/ui/marks.tsx remains a separate cleanup.
icon_imports=365
